name: filename
description: Name of the uploaded GCS object

name: bucket
description: GCS bucket name where the file was uploaded

name: size
description: Size of the file in bytes

name: content_type
description: MIME content type of the file

name: word_count
description: Calculated or simulated word count from OCR

name: tags
description: List of tags extracted from the document

name: ocr_text_preview
description: Preview of first 200 characters of OCR text

name: process_timestamp
description: Timestamp when the document was processed by the pipeline
